name: artemyurov/moonshine-command-schedule-job
description: Single entry point for Laravel scheduled commands and queued jobs with MoonShine admin UI

suggest.laravel/horizon: Required for queue-based job deduplication and termination in CommandScheduleJobService
suggest.illuminate/redis: Required for queue job deletion via Horizon
suggest.artemyurov/moonshine-db-joblog: Required for PID-based job termination in CommandScheduleJobService
